winning_idea: AgentAuditor — The agent that watches other agents

cross_doc_audit.risk_tag_alignment: PASS (Risk 3 Venice fallback fixed in v1.1)

corrections: C1: Demo score changed from 42/CAUTION to 31/BLOCKLIST for consistency
C2: Added chainId: ChainId to TrustScore interface
C3: Fixed ChainConfig erc8004 field comments (testnet vs mainnet differ)
C4: Fixed Olas getService return type address → uint96 securityDeposit
I1: Defined CAUTION attestation value as zero (neutral int128)
I2: Renamed findAgentByAddress(address) all-chains → findAgentAcrossChains(address)
I4: Added resolveInput interface spec for smart input backend resolution
I5: Fixed Concern 3 reference: Sections 6.4-6.5 → Demo Scenes 4-5
I6: Fixed Risk 12: 10 components → 11 components
I7: Added Optimism and Polygon RPC URLs to Section 9
I9: Added /api/analyze route contract to Section 5 (request/response/error formats)
I10: Added ENS to component table row 8 smart input description
M2: Fixed risk categories checklist to include Risks 7, 10
M3: Updated demo duration from 3-4 minutes to 4-5 minutes
Version bumped V1 → V2
A1: Added Venice JSON fallback (retry without response_format if json_schema rejected) — Risk 3 mitigation
A2: Fixed bigint loop increment id++ → id += 1n in searchAgentsByName (compile error)
A3: Fixed feedbackHash negative integer — added >>> 0 unsigned cast + BigInt wrap
A4: Fixed validateTrustScore breakdown sum tolerance 1 → 5 (LLM inconsistency)
A5: Fixed Venice fallback — wrap entire API call in try/catch, not just JSON.parse
A6: Fixed TransactionTable hardcoded mainnet explorer URLs — now testnet-aware
A7: Fixed Olas agent instance loop — owner: addr instead of owner: multisig
A8: Fixed findAgentByAddress fromBlock:0n — use last 500k blocks to avoid RPC range errors
A9: Fixed Olas result typing — replaced (result as any)[1] with destructured + Array.isArray guard
P1: Task 0.1 — replaced `bun add` with copy-complete-package.json from Architecture Section 18 to preserve all scripts + exact pinned versions
P2: Task 6.3 — removed redundant manual script JSON; now verifies scripts from Task 0.1 package.json
P3: Task 5.5 + Phase 5 gate + Phase 7 demo prep + appendix table — removed double `--turbopack` flag (already in package.json dev script)
P4: Phase 7 gate — added `bun run build` production build check before demo recording
P5: Phase 8 — added Task 8.0 to create README.md with setup instructions, demo link placeholder, contract addresses

gotchas.gotcha: llama-3.1-405b RETIRED May 2025. Use hermes-3-llama-3.1-405b or llama-3.3-70b
Free tier only 10 prompts/day — insufficient for dev. Mock-first strategy critical
gotchas.impact: Build with mocks, swap real API last

gotchas.gotcha: enable_e2ee param available — relevant for privacy narrative
gotchas.impact: Add to API calls for demo impact

gotchas.gotcha: getAgent(agentId) DOES NOT EXIST. Use getMetadata(agentId, key) + tokenURI(agentId)
agentOf(address) DOES NOT EXIST. No reverse lookup. Use Transfer events or balanceOf/tokenOfOwnerByIndex
getAggregatedFeedback DOES NOT EXIST. Use getSummary(agentId, clientAddresses, tag1, tag2) after getClients(agentId)
giveFeedback uses int128 (signed) — supports negative feedback
IdentityRegistry is ERC-721 based — agents are NFTs
Etherscan removed free API access for Base chain. May need paid plan or alternative
gotchas.impact: Must verify API key works or use direct RPC

gotchas.gotcha: 10,000 tx limit per query — must paginate
gotchas.impact: Pagination logic needed for active agents

gotchas.gotcha: use client directive required for hook-using components
gotchas.impact: All interactive UI files need directive

gotchas.gotcha: NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix for client env vars. Venice API key must NOT be client-exposed
gotchas.impact: API calls go through server route

gotchas.gotcha: forge script vs forge create behave differently
gotchas.impact: Use forge script from start for deployment

gotchas.gotcha: readContract for views, writeContract for state changes. giveFeedback is a write
v4 uses @import tailwindcss instead of @tailwind directives, config in CSS @theme
gotchas.impact: Greenfield so no migration needed, but research examples may show v3 patterns

breaking_changes: Venice model IDs changed: llama-3.1-405b -> hermes-3-llama-3.1-405b, mistral-small-3.2-24b -> mistral-31-24b
ERC-8004 function names differ from research: getAgent/agentOf/getAggregatedFeedback don't exist
Basescan free API access for Base may have been removed

unknowns: ERC-8004 correct interaction patterns (3 wrong function names found)
Venice prompt engineering for agent behavioral analysis
